'''âh-v-r''' ('''havara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:elicit|elicit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elicit|elicit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-v-r
|-
! Lemma
| havara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:havarithi|havarithi]] || [[word:havariji|havariji]] || [[word:havarishi|havarishi]] || [[word:havari|havari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:havaruthuth|havaruthuth]] || [[word:havarujuj|havarujuj]] || [[word:havarushush|havarushush]] || [[word:havar|havar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:havaruthu|havaruthu]] || [[word:havaruju|havaruju]] || [[word:havarushu|havarushu]] || [[word:havaru|havaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:havarufuth|havarufuth]] || [[word:havarufuj|havarufuj]] || [[word:havarufush|havarufush]] || [[word:havaruf|havaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:havarethe|havarethe]] || [[word:havareje|havareje]] || [[word:havareshe|havareshe]] || [[word:havare|havare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:havarothoth|havarothoth]] || [[word:havarojoj|havarojoj]] || [[word:havaroshosh|havaroshosh]] || [[word:havar|havar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:havarotho|havarotho]] || [[word:havarojo|havarojo]] || [[word:havarosho|havarosho]] || [[word:havaro|havaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:havarofoth|havarofoth]] || [[word:havarofoj|havarofoj]] || [[word:havarofosh|havarofosh]] || [[word:havarof|havarof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:havarĂŻfĂŻf|havarĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻfĂŻf|havarĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻfĂŻf|havarĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻfĂŻf|havarĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]] || [[word:havarĂŻf|havarĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:havarĂŠthĂŠ|havarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:havarĂŠjĂŠ|havarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:havarĂŠshĂŠ|havarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:havarĂŠ|havarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:havarathath|havarathath]] || [[word:havarajaj|havarajaj]] || [[word:havarashash|havarashash]] || [[word:havar|havar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:havaratha|havaratha]] || [[word:havaraja|havaraja]] || [[word:havarasha|havarasha]] || [[word:havara|havara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:havarafath|havarafath]] || [[word:havarafaj|havarafaj]] || [[word:havarafash|havarafash]] || [[word:havaraf|havaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:havarasha|havarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohavarasha|gohavarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihavarasha|gokihavarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:havarnĂŒsha|havarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohavarnknĂŒsha|gohavarnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihavarnĂŒsha|gokihavarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:havarshĂ«sha|havarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohavarnkshĂ«sha|gohavarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihavarshĂ«sha|gokihavarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:havarrosha|havarrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohavarnkrosha|gohavarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihavarrosha|gokihavarrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:havarmusha|havarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohavarnkmusha|gohavarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihavarmusha|gokihavarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:havarsherasha|havarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohavarnksherasha|gohavarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihavarsherasha|gokihavarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:havarngasha|havarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohavarnkngasha|gohavarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihavarngasha|gokihavarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:havaryasha|havaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohavarnkyasha|gohavarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihavaryasha|gokihavaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:havaryamasha|havaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohavarnkyamasha|gohavarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihavaryamasha|gokihavaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:havarnĂŒshĂ«sha|havarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohavarnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gohavarnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihavarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokihavarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:havarnĂŒrosha|havarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohavarnknĂŒrosha|gohavarnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihavarnĂŒrosha|gokihavarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havarnĂŒmusha|havarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohavarnknĂŒmusha|gohavarnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihavarnĂŒmusha|gokihavarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:havarshĂ«nĂŒsha|havarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohavarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gohavarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihavarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokihavarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:havarshĂ«rosha|havarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohavarnkshĂ«rosha|gohavarnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihavarshĂ«rosha|gokihavarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havarshĂ«musha|havarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohavarnkshĂ«musha|gohavarnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihavarshĂ«musha|gokihavarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:havarronĂŒsha|havarronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohavarnkronĂŒsha|gohavarnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihavarronĂŒsha|gokihavarronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:havarroshĂ«sha|havarroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohavarnkroshĂ«sha|gohavarnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihavarroshĂ«sha|gokihavarroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havarromusha|havarromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohavarnkromusha|gohavarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihavarromusha|gokihavarromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:havarmunĂŒsha|havarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohavarnkmunĂŒsha|gohavarnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihavarmunĂŒsha|gokihavarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:havarmushĂ«sha|havarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohavarnkmushĂ«sha|gohavarnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihavarmushĂ«sha|gokihavarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:havarmurosha|havarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohavarnkmurosha|gohavarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihavarmurosha|gokihavarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:havar|havar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠr|hĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohavar|hohavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohĂŠvĂŠr|hohĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohavar|hohohavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohĂŠvĂŠr|hohohĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒhavar|nĂŒhavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒhĂŠvĂŠr|nĂŒhĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhavar|nĂŒnĂŒhavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠvĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻhavar|nĂŻhavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻhĂŠvĂŠr|nĂŻhĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhavar|nĂŻnĂŻhavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠvĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhavar|luhavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhĂŠvĂŠr|luhĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhavar|luluhavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhĂŠvĂŠr|luluhĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihavar|lihavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihĂŠvĂŠr|lihĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihavar|lilihavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihĂŠvĂŠr|lilihĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohavar|kohavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohĂŠvĂŠr|kohĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohavar|kokohavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohĂŠvĂŠr|kokohĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehavar|kehavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehĂŠvĂŠr|kehĂŠvĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehavar|kekehavar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehĂŠvĂŠr|kekehĂŠvĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
